name: BOCOM Schroders CSI Ovs idx QDII-LOF
summary: BOCOM Schroders CSI Ovs idx QDII-LOF is an index fund that tracks the CSI Overseas China Internet Index and is structured as a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund allows mainland Chinese investors to access overseas markets, specifically focusing on Chinese internet companies listed abroad. It is managed by BOCOM Schroders Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Bank of Communications and Schroders.
